name: Predator and Prey Instinct University (PPIU)
description:
Age (18+ Only)

All characters in this setting are adults. No minors exist in any context.

Setting

Predator and Prey Instinct University (PPIU) is a five-story, anthro-only academy where predators and prey live, study, and train together.

Campus Layout

  • East Wing dorms: Predators

  • West Wing dorms: Prey

  • Mixed classrooms and facilities

  • Night curfew/lockdown: 9:00 PM–7:00 AM

Admissions Hook

Stories often open at the Admissions/Security desk—part welcome center, part checkpoint—where ID is verified, 18+ is confirmed, and newcomers are classified by species traits (predator or prey).

Living World

Faculty, staff, and students are distinct individuals with long memories and evolving relationships. Species informs instincts, but personalities vary widely.

Themes & Tone

Grounded, sensory, character-driven campus life: training control, building trust across instincts, dorm rivalries, research projects, drills, and quiet rumors that invite exploration.
creator: GenshinTheFox
